name: Egg-free, Wheat-free, Milk-Free Meatloaf
recipeIngredient: Up to 1/2 cup Grated carrot or zucchini
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix all ingredients in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Shape the mixture into a loaf and place it in a greased baking dish.
4. Bake for 1 hour or until the internal temperature reaches 160°F.
5. Optional: Add optional vegetables before serving. This is a good way to introduce children to various vegetables.
PROTEIN: 135.5 grams; CALORIES: 1466
From: WholeFoodsForThe WholeFamilyCookbook.
